response.justification: Maria is a strong, versatile senior engineer with deep open-source involvement, Linux experience, and impressive technical breadth across web, embedded, and high-performance systems. However, this is an executive-level leadership role requiring German at C1 minimum — her German is listed as basic, which is a hard disqualifier for a client-facing consulting position. She also lacks a demonstrated track record of formal team leadership, technical project management, and architectural consulting at the level the role demands, and UML/requirements-management expertise is not evidenced.
strengths: Deep open-source and Linux background, including founding and running the GISCollective platform
Broad full-stack technical range with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring via workshops and courses)
Completed university degree plus experience across diverse domains and industries
concerns: German listed as basic — role requires C1 minimum for client advisory work
No formal leadership or people/technical management roles despite 15+ years of experience
No demonstrated UML, requirements management, or IT security/compliance advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal leadership/management track record
Strong open-source, Linux, and architecture-adjacent engineering background
